name: US Cash Advance
description_short: Raleigh, NC's US Cash Advance storefront at 112 Seaboard Ave offers fast payday loans and title loans.
description_long:
Located at 112 Seaboard Ave unit 2 in Raleigh, NC, US Cash Advance operates as a standalone payday and title loan office serving the local community. The storefront is open Monday through Friday from 8 AM to 9 PM and Saturdays and Sundays from 10 AM to 7 PM, making it accessible for Raleigh residents who need quick cash access outside traditional banking hours.

The Raleigh location offers fast payday loans and secured title loans, both designed for quick cash access. You can contact the office directly at (919) 373-3757 to discuss your needs, check current rates, or apply over the phone.

If you're a Raleigh resident facing an unexpected expense or short-term cash need, bring a valid ID, proof of income (pay stub or bank statement), and a recent bank statement or proof of residence to speed up the application process. US Cash Advance provides straightforward loan terms without credit checks, making it a practical option for immediate cash needs.
pros: Reported processing time under 45 minutes for in-person applications
Accepts all credit types including bad credit borrowers
Extended operating hours including weekends (8am-9pm weekdays, 10am-7pm weekends)
Unsecured loans with no collateral requirement
Loan amounts range from $100-$50,000 depending on product
Physical storefront location in Detroit for face-to-face service
Minimal paperwork process with clear staff communication per customer reviews
cons: No interest rates, APRs, or fee schedules disclosed on website
Incomplete regulatory/compliance disclosure (footer text cuts off)
Limited facility capacity (cramped waiting area noted in reviews)
Website contains apparent consistency issues (reviews mention competitor name 'Express Payday Loans')
No information about actual loan term lengths or repayment schedules
best_for: Individuals in Detroit needing same-day cash with poor or no credit history
Consumers who prefer in-person lending interactions and face-to-face guidance
Borrowers unable to qualify for traditional bank loans who can visit a physical location
diagnosis: US Cash Advance is best suited for Detroit-area residents with poor credit who need emergency cash within hours and can visit the physical location in person. Critical caveat: the website lacks essential disclosures on interest rates, APRs, and specific loan terms, making it impossible to assess whether this lender's rates are reasonable or compliant with Michigan payday lending regulations—research current rates and terms directly before applying.
services: Online application and third-party lender connection
meta_description: US Cash Advance at 112 Seaboard Ave, Raleigh, NC. Fast payday and title loans with no credit check.
